backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage, registration, login, and settings updates (wake word, language, mode, mentor, conversation memory) with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two voice interaction features (fixing Speech Recognition initialization and implementing autonomous background operation) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and recent changes of every hook, component, page, and type file.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the JARVIS React app, loading Orbitron, Rajdhani, and Share Tech Mono fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with public routes (login, register) and AuthGuard-protected routes (transition, dashboard, settings), redirecting unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Application header component displaying the JARVIS logo, title, assistant status indicator, version, mode toggle, user avatar, settings navigation, and logout button.
frontend/src/components/ArcReactorCore.t: Renders an animated 3D Arc Reactor visualization using React Three Fiber, featuring rotating torus rings, a pulsing core sphere, and floating particles that speed up when the assistant is active.
frontend/src/components/BrightnessOverla: A fixed full-screen black overlay div used to control screen brightness via CSS opacity transitions.
Displays a scrollable chat log of user and assistant conversation entries with timestamps, and shows an interim transcript with a blinking cursor while the user is speaking.
frontend/src/components/HolographicBackg: Draws an animated canvas background featuring a hex grid, radial glow, a moving scan line, and drifting particles to create a holographic UI aesthetic.
frontend/src/components/HUDRings.tsx: Renders an animated canvas-based HUD ring display with rotating dashed arcs, tick marks, and a center glow that changes color based on the assistant's current state (idle, listening, processing, speaking).
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Provides a dropdown UI for selecting the assistant's language, persisting the choice via a mutation hook and noting that language can also be changed by voice command.
frontend/src/components/MemoryPanel.tsx: Displays stored conversation memory entries in a scrollable list and provides a two-step confirmation button to clear all memory via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/MentorCard.tsx: Displays a mentor character card with avatar, name, role label, and a randomizable motivational quote, styled in gold or cyan theme based on the mentor's style.
frontend/src/components/MentorSettings.t: Provides a settings UI for selecting or typing a mentor character name from presets, saving the choice via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ModeToggle.tsx: A toggle button that switches the user profile between 'professional' and 'personal' modes using a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PasswordInput.ts: A password input field component with a toggle button to show or hide the password.
Renders a panel with buttons and inputs for PC controls including volume, brightness, scroll, open URL, and Wikipedia search, with live volume/brightness indicators.
frontend/src/components/SearchResultPane: A modal overlay that displays a Wikipedia search result with title, thumbnail, summary, and a link to the full article.
Displays a colored pulsing dot and label reflecting the current voice assistant state (idle, listening, processing, speaking, etc.).
frontend/src/components/ThemedPanel.tsx: A reusable styled container panel supporting cyan, gold, or dark variants with an optional title header and corner bracket decoration.
frontend/src/components/VoiceControlButt: A circular mic button that visually reflects the voice assistant state (listening, processing, speaking) with animated pulse rings and appropriate icons.
frontend/src/components/WakeWordSettings: A React component that renders a settings panel allowing users to view and update their wake word, using the useSetWakeWord mutation hook and displaying save feedback.
frontend/src/components/WaveformVisualiz: A canvas-based React component that animates a bar waveform visualizer with state-dependent colors and motion patterns for idle, listening, processing, speaking, and wake-listening states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePCControls.ts: A custom hook that exposes browser-level PC control actions including volume, brightness, scrolling, URL opening, and Wikipedia search, managing their state locally.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, authentication (register/login), and settings mutations (wake word, language, mode, mentor).
A React hook that wraps the Web Speech Recognition API, supporting continuous/interim results, auto-restart, and callbacks for result, error, start, and end events.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: A React hook that wraps the Web Speech Synthesis API, providing speak and cancel functions with voice selection, speaking state, and available voices list.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceAssistant.ts: A React hook that orchestrates a full voice assistant flow including wake-word detection, speech recognition, command processing, and speech synthesis, with support for PC controls and conversation logging.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining the JARVIS dark theme using Tailwind and OKLCH color tokens, including custom component classes for panels, glow effects, and buttons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: The main dashboard page that composes the JARVIS UI with voice assistant controls, holographic visuals, PC controls, conversation log, and mentor card using the user's profile data.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that handles Internet Identity authentication alongside email/password login, with JARVIS-themed UI including animated corner decorations and a logo.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page that collects username, email, and password, requires Internet Identity connection, and redirects to login on success.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page with tabbed UI for voice (wake word), language, mentor, and memory configuration panels.
frontend/src/pages/TransitionScreen.tsx: Animated boot/transition screen that types out system initialization messages, shows a greeting, then navigates to the dashboard.
frontend/src/types/speechRecognition.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition, events, results) and augments the global Window type as a single source of truth.
frontend/src/utils/languageMaps.ts: Exports a list of 40+ supported languages with BCP-47 codes and helper functions to convert between language names and codes or detect a language from a transcript.
frontend/src/utils/mentorMessages.ts: Provides a database of motivational messages and schedule prompts keyed by mentor persona (e.g., Rengoku, Naruto, Tony Stark) with a default fallback.
frontend/src/utils/timeGreeting.ts: Exports two small utility functions that return a time-of-day greeting string and corresponding emoji based on the current hour.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/wikipediaApi.ts: Fetches Wikipedia article summaries by title using the REST API, falling back to an OpenSearch query if the direct lookup returns a 404.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an extended color palette (including JARVIS-themed cyan/gold/dark colors using OKLCH), border radii, shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a JARVIS-inspired desktop AI assistant app with features like voice interaction, multi-user memory, animated UI, and PC control, along with known issues and existing feature inventory.
